name: fitwave-backend
description: FitWave Express backend with JWT auth and RBAC

scripts.test: node -e "require('./index.js'); setTimeout(()=>{ console.log('Backend smoke test passed'); process.exit(0); }, 800);"
scripts.validate: node -c index.js && node -c automated_test/runner.js && node -c automated_test/discover.js && echo 'All files valid'

author: FitWave Team
